message:
fix(abi): fix putgrent join byte slice for test compilation, promote getpw in matrix

Fix putgrent member join to use &b","[..] slice coercion instead of
b"," literal (resolves E0277 Borrow trait bound error in test mode).
Update support_matrix.json to mark getpw as Implemented.

GCT: 461→414, Implemented: 1931→1978

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
